text_block_list.text: Grrr...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As we walk back to the academy, I hear a feeble
and vaguely cute-sounding noise.
choice_data_list: Was that your stomach?
Was that your stomach?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You fool! I'm appalled that you'd even suggest as
much. You need to get your ears checked!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: That was clearly an animal!
choice_data_list: Ah, an animal...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I look around and find...

text_block_list.name: Puppy
text_block_list.text: Whine... Whine...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: It's a puppy...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
And it's injured. It looks like it's been pecked at...
The crows around here can be quite vicious.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: No collar. Hmm...
choice_data_list:
First things first, we should take care of those
injuries!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Hold on. Your heart is in the right place, but
poorly administered medical care can do more
harm than good.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Let's consult a professional first. I believe there's
a place nearby that specializes in taking care of
stray animals.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Hello? My name is Air Groove, and I'm a student
at Tracen Academy.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I found an injured puppy by the river near the
academy. It doesn't have a collar.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before long, someone from the animal protection
group comes and takes care of the puppy.

text_block_list.name: Veterinary Staff
text_block_list.text:
All done. The injuries weren't too bad. They
should heal before too long.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: That's a relief. Thank you for coming so quickly.

text_block_list.name: Veterinary Staff
text_block_list.text:
No, thank you so much for calling us. Hey, little
fella. You should say thanks too!

text_block_list.name: Puppy
text_block_list.text: Woof woof! Yip!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Wh-whoa! Calm down! You haven't fully
recovered yet!

text_block_list.name: Puppy
text_block_list.text: Woof woof!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Heh... Hahaha! You're quite rambunctious, aren't
you?
choice_data_list: (Whoa... A genuine smile!)

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Hm? If you have something to say, just say it.
choice_data_list: Nope! Not a thing...
Nope! Not a thing...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You're a terrible liar, you know. Go on—spit it
out!

text_block_list.name: Veterinary Staff
text_block_list.text: E-excuse me? Sorry to butt in, but...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Not at all! What is it?

text_block_list.name: Veterinary Staff
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to ask what you wish to do with this little
one.

text_block_list.name: Veterinary Staff
text_block_list.text:
So you see, I'm afraid we're full up with other
strays at the moment.

text_block_list.name: Veterinary Staff
text_block_list.text:
Would you mind watching her until we can find a
good home?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Y-you want me to take care of it?

text_block_list.name: Veterinary Staff
text_block_list.text:
I understand it's a big ask, but she seems to have
taken quite the shine to you!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... Unfortunately, the academy has a strict
no-pet policy.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I've also never owned a dog before... I'm not sure
I would be capable.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove's objections make sense, but after
seeing how she smiled moments ago, I have a
hard time believing she means them. I decide to
chime in.
choice_data_list: I think I've got enough room at my place...
I think I've got enough room at my place...
I'm sure you can manage it!
I'm sure you can manage it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove's objections make sense, but after
seeing how she smiled moments ago, I have a
hard time believing she means them. I decide to
chime in.
choice_data_list: I think I've got enough room at my place...
I think I've got enough room at my place...
I'm sure you can manage it!
I'm sure you can manage it!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
What?! Have you given proper consideration to
the meaning of what you're saying?!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Taking care of an animal isn't all fun and games,
you know!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Dogs, especially, require a ridiculous amount of
care and attention. You have to walk them, train
them, brush their fur...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: And you wish to hog all of that for yourself?!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: ...Ack.
choice_data_list: She's a cute one, isn't she?
She's a cute one, isn't she?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Graaahhhh, enough!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I wouldn't be able to get a wink of sleep knowing
that she's in the hands of someone as
irresponsible as you! I'll get the permission to care
for her myself!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And as if to respond to Air Groove's cry, the
puppy yaps happily at her feet.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: You really think so?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Ngh... This is a life-or-death matter! We have to
take it seriously.
choice_data_list: I am.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: And what makes you so confident?
choice_data_list: Because I'm your trainer!
Because I'm your trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell Air Groove that after all the time I've spent
with her, I know she can do anything she sets her
mind to.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Hmph...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Frankly, your endless optimism grates on my
nerves. But I shall live up to your estimation of
me.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Come on, little one.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And as if to respond to Air Groove's cry, the
puppy yaps happily at her feet.
